resolution_path: First bake attempt. Symptoms: right zone buttons misplaced; center labels invisible; root panel white. Root causes: Col/Row VLG wrappers missing childControlWidth/Height=true + ContentSizeFitter; root Image color defaulting to white. Fixes: Col VLG + Row HLG childControlWidth/Height=true + childForceExpand=false; ContentSizeFitter PreferredSize/PreferredSize on Col/Row containers; root bgImage.color=ui-surface-dark (0.196,0.196,0.196,1) + raycastTarget=false. Files: UiBakeHandler.Archetype.cs, UiBakeHandler.cs.

All 16 LayoutGroups serialized m_ChildControlWidth=0 despite source =true. Root cause: stale-DLL bake — unity:bake-ui ran before Editor recompiled .cs edits. Fix: added force-compile gate — run unity_compile (or batchmode unity:compile-check when Editor closed) BEFORE every unity:bake-ui invocation. Process gate only; no source touched.

Hud-bar root Y=80 too short — right Col stacked overflows below dark strip; center labels invisible. Root cause: ApplyPanelKindRectDefaults PanelKind.Hud sizeDelta.y=80. Fix: sizeDelta.y=144 (fits 132 stack + 4+4 padding + headroom; center 3-row 32px label stack also fits). File: UiBakeHandler.cs:666.

ThemedLabel TMP placeholder -- hard to see; readout TMPs render empty pre-runtime. Fixes: SpawnThemedLabelChild: TMP color=Color.white + enableAutoSizing=true range 8..18. SpawnSegmentedReadoutRenderTargets: placeholder text='0' + color=Color.white for visual smoke verify pre-bind. Files: UiBakeHandler.Button.cs:SpawnThemedLabelChild, UiBakeHandler.Archetype.cs:SpawnSegmentedReadoutRenderTargets.

Mid-loop blocker — Bee build IPC FD exhaustion. Symptom: compilation_failed=true with NotSupportedException on BeeDriver file descriptor. Root cause: Unity Bee async-pipe FD pool degraded mid-session; not a code error. Recovery: restart Unity Editor (close + reopen project). After restart compile gate clean. No source touched.

Hud-bar root rect hardcoded in C# (ApplyPanelKindRectDefaults) — DB had no authority over panel-root sizing. Fix: migration 0109_panel_detail_rect_json adds panel_detail.rect_json jsonb; snapshot exporter emits fields.rect_json; UiBakeHandler.ApplyPanelRectJsonOverlay overlays DB rect on top of kind defaults (per-axis last-write-wins); hud-bar seeded with rebake-6 values {pivot:[0.5,1],anchor_min:[0,1],anchor_max:[1,1],size_delta:[-16,144],anchored_position:[0,-8]}. Files: db/migrations/0109_panel_detail_rect_json.sql, tools/scripts/snapshot-export-game-ui.mjs, Assets/Scripts/Editor/Bridge/UiBakeHandler.cs.

Toolbar overlapped hud-bar bottom edge (top inset 100px vs hud-bar footprint 152px). Root cause: toolbar PrefabInstance scene override m_AnchoredPosition.y=50 + m_SizeDelta.y=-300 resolved to top inset 100. Fix: CityScene.unity toolbar overrides patched — m_SizeDelta.y=-352 + m_AnchoredPosition.y=24 → top inset 152 (no overlap), bottom inset 200 preserved. Also: Imp-3 landed this session — bake handler now propagates warnings to MCP mutation_result. Scene-only fix; toolbar prefab untouched. File: Assets/Scenes/CityScene.unity (toolbar PrefabInstance overrides).
